title: Multiple $ucover_clk with the same label should be an error
body:
---


Author Name: **Vasu Kandadi**
Original Redmine Issue: 72 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2009-03-23
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

```
    covlabel:
      cover property (@(posedge clk) cyc==5);
    covlabel:  // Error: Duplicate block_identifier
      cover property (@(posedge clk) cyc==5);

```
